positive: A majestic forest creature, blending the aesthetics of a mythological deer and a stylized celestial bear, standing at the center of the frame. The design features intricate, symmetrical bioluminescent wing-like structures and flowing, detailed antlers, giving it a powerful yet graceful silhouette. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau with Japanese woodblock print influence (Ukiyo-e meets Art Deco). Composition: Central, full-body portrait on a solid, muted gradient background (e.g., deep sapphire to midnight blue) to maximize contrast for printing. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow emanating from the creature itself (internal light source), casting sharp, defined shadows. Color: Highly saturated jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted against stark black linework and glowing gold accents. Highly detailed linework, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, low detail, noisy, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, celebrity, photorealistic, grainy
